violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

Cut tomatoes, lettuce, and slaw (held overnight in the prep unit) observed at 46-60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: counter along Thayer Street behind equipment cold hold unit beneath flattop grill prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The walls have an accumulation of old tape and adhesive residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The stairs and floors, especially in the basement, and basement freezer walk in have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Hot dogs and cheese observed held at 54-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold hold unit beneath flattop grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024
Water from the soda machine at the soda syrup rack observed dripping into the trash can next to the hand wash sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024
The walk in fan cover has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024

The water faucet in the toilet room is in poor repair, unable to be turned off completely, with a puddle of water observed on the floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2024
